# Team-X Documentation Index

**AI-optimized documentation index for LLM consumption**

---

## Project Overview

**Project:** Team-X
**Description:** AI-powered workforce desktop application
**Version:** 1.0.0
**Repository:** https://github.com/teamflow-x/team-x
**Website:** https://teamflow-x.com
**Documentation:** https://docs.teamflow-x.com

---

## Documentation Structure

```
docs/
├── user-guide/
│   ├── comprehensive-user-guide.md          # Main documentation (500+ sections)
│   ├── getting-started/
│   │   └── quick-start.md                  # 15-minute setup guide
│   ├── scenarios/                           # Real-world scenarios (7 scenarios)
│   │   ├── 01-product-development-lifecycle.md
│   │   ├── 02-cost-optimization-playbook.md
│   │   ├── 03-failure-recovery-workflows.md
│   │   ├── 04-cross-functional-collaboration.md
│   │   ├── 05-autonomous-routine-governance.md
│   │   ├── 06-multi-workspace-operations.md
│   │   └── 07-shift-handoff-playbook.md
│   ├── templates/                           # Reusable templates
│   │   ├── handoff-document.md
│   │   ├── meeting-agenda.md
│   │   ├── ticket-templates.md
│   │   ├── routine-templates.md
│   │   └── README.md
│   ├── video-scripts/                       # Video tutorial scripts
│   │   └── README.md
│   ├── faq.md                               # Frequently asked questions
│   ├── troubleshooting.md                    # Common issues and solutions
│   ├── glossary.md                          # 200+ term glossary
│   ├── keyboard-shortcuts.md                 # Power user shortcuts
│   ├── accessibility-guide.md                # WCAG compliance
│   ├── migration-guide.md                   # Platform migration
│   └── cli-reference.md                      # CLI and Command Palette
├── developer-guide/
│   ├── api-reference.md                     # REST API, MCP, plugins
│   └── integration-guide.md                  # GitHub, Slack, Jira, etc.
└── README.md                                 # Project overview
```

---

## Key Concepts

**Team-X:** Desktop application providing AI-powered workforce
**Employee:** AI agent with curated role (57 roles available)
**Ticket:** Work unit assigned to employee
**Agent Run:** Single execution of agent working on ticket
**Mission Control:** Real-time operations dashboard
**Command Palette:** NLU-driven command interface (Ctrl+K/Cmd+K)
**Copilot:** Proactive intelligence analyzer
**Autonomy Control Plane:** Governance system (runtimes, routines, budgets)
**Workspace:** Company container (employees, tickets, budgets)
**Provider:** AI model provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama)
**MCP:** Model Context Protocol for extending agent capabilities

---

## Core Features

1. **AI Workforce:** Hire AI employees with specialized roles
2. **Natural Language Interface:** Command Palette (Ctrl+K)
3. **Mission Control Dashboard:** Real-time operations overview
4. **Autonomous Execution:** Agents work independently on tickets
5. **Budget Governance:** Per-ticket and monthly budget controls
6. **Multi-Workspace:** Manage multiple clients/projects
7. **Provider Routing:** Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama with failover
8. **Routine Automation:** Scheduled recurring tasks
9. **Copilot Insights:** Proactive recommendations
10. **Audit Trail:** Complete event logging

---

## Quick Reference

### Keyboard Shortcuts

- `Ctrl+K` / `Cmd+K` — Open Command Palette
- `Ctrl+T` / `Cmd+T` — Tickets Panel
- `Ctrl+E` / `Cmd+E` — Employees Panel
- `Ctrl+A` / `Cmd+A` — Autonomy Control Plane
- `Ctrl+D` / `Cmd+D` — Mission Control Dashboard
- `Esc` — Close/go back

### Command Palette Examples

- "Create ticket for fixing login bug"
- "Hire a UI/UX designer"
- "Show our spend this month"
- "Assign all open tickets to Alex"
- "Cancel all running agents"

### Employee Roles (57 total)

**Engineering:** Full Stack Engineer, Backend Engineer, Frontend Engineer, DevOps Engineer, Security Engineer, QA Engineer, Database Architect
**Design:** UI/UX Designer, Graphic Designer, Product Designer, Design Systems Lead
**Product:** Product Manager, Technical Writer, Business Analyst
**Marketing:** Content Writer, SEO Specialist, Social Media Manager, Email Marketing Specialist
**Data:** Data Analyst, Data Scientist, ML Engineer
**Operations:** Project Manager, Scrum Master, Release Manager

### Platform Support

- **Windows:** Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
- **macOS:** macOS 11+ (Big Sur or later)
- **Linux:** Ubuntu 20.04+, Debian 11+

---

## Common Use Cases

**Product Development:**
- Hire product team (PM, Designer, Engineers)
- Create tickets for features, bugs, reviews
- Agents collaborate autonomously
- Track progress in Mission Control

**Agency Work:**
- One workspace per client
- Master policies for consistency
- Employee sharing across workspaces
- Client-specific billing

**Shift Handoff:**
- Pre-handoff validation with Doctor
- Comprehensive handoff documentation
- Backup operator coverage
- Post-handoff reintegration

**Cost Optimization:**
- Budget caps and alerts
- Provider selection (cheaper models for routine work)
- Routine schedule optimization
- Spend analytics via Copilot

---
